title: Tetos bread / Baguette sword
description: I made the Bread loaf / baguette wich belongs to the vocaloid Kasane Teto
body:
## 🍞 Teto Bread Sword – Carb-Powered Chaos  

Tired of boring Netherite swords? Rename it **Bread** and wield Kasane Teto’s ultimate weapon: the mighty bread blade.  

### 🎤 FEATURES:  

- Slap the name “Bread” on your Netherite Sword and watch it transform into the legendary Vocaloid Bread of Doom  
- So powerful it could make Creepers kneel… or at least get hungry  

![teto](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ab011cc9f56b1b4da246e95e2d71c3e75d00311.png)

#### 🧪 Requires:  

You’ll need **Optifine** (Forge) or **CIT Resewn** (Fabric) to make it work (because vanilla Minecraft doesn’t believe in anime carbs).
